This particular configuration usually sells for around $1,500 at Amazon, where it has never dropped below $1,200, making today’s deal a solid $350 discount. For some added context, Lenovo is currently selling a similarly-specced Legion tower with the lower-tier RTX 5060 GPU for around $1,400, which makes this Woot listing particularly worth considering with some serious value.
